data.title: Resolve docs/skogix/ duplication between parent and submodule
data.description:
**Context:** docs/skogix/ exists in both parent skogai repo (@docs/skogix/) and skogix submodule (skogix/docs/skogix/), creating duplication and potential sync issues.

**Current duplication:**

* `@docs/skogix/user.md` vs `skogix/docs/skogix/user.md`
* `@docs/skogix/definitions.md` vs `skogix/docs/skogix/definitions.md`
* Memory extraction framework exists in skogix but not parent

**Decision needed:**

* Single source of truth location (parent @docs/skogix/ or submodule)?
* Symlink strategy or direct merge?
* How to handle skogix-specific docs vs parent-level docs?

**Impact:** Currently causes confusion about which file to update and where context lives.

**Related:** Part of skogix folder integration (#skogix-integration)
